debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v p : NNReal
t : ℝ
S : Set ℝ := Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v)
⊢ ∀ x ∈ S, |Real.exp (t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v))

proof:
intro x hx
        rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
        refine (le_abs_self _).trans ?_
        rw [abs_mul]
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
        · calc |x| = |x - μ + μ| := by rw [sub_add_cancel]
            _ ≤ |x - μ| + |μ| := abs_add_le _ _
            _ ≤ 2 * √v + |μ| := add_le_add_right (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1], by linarith [hx.2]⟩) _
            _ = |μ| + 2 * √v := add_comm _ _
        · exact abs_nonneg t
